summary: Tested new 4-tier subscription system for PARAS REWARD app. All backend APIs working correctly (17/17 tests passed). Frontend subscription page loads and displays all 4 plans with correct pricing. Minor issue: /api/settings/public endpoint missing causes toast error but doesn't affect functionality.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist - frontend tries to fetch payment UPI config from this endpoint

ui_bugs.issue: Toast error 'Failed to load subscription plans' appears due to missing /api/settings/public endpoint

action_items: OPTIONAL: Create /api/settings/public endpoint to return payment UPI ID and other public settings to eliminate toast error
critical_code_review_comments: SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS config correctly defines 4 tiers: explorer (1.0x, 100 taps), startup (1.5x, 200 taps), growth (2.0x, 300 taps), elite (3.0x, 400 taps)
calculate_mining_rate() correctly uses subscription multiplier from get_user_subscription_info()
Tap game limits correctly enforced based on subscription plan via sub_info['tap_limit']
Payment submission endpoint validates plan (startup/growth/elite) and duration (monthly/quarterly/half_yearly/yearly)
Admin pricing update endpoint allows updating all plan prices
Explorer burn job correctly targets users who never had paid subscription

success_rate.frontend: 95% (page loads, all plans display, minor toast error)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription system fully implemented and working. Admin user is on 'Startup' plan (migrated from VIP). The /api/settings/public endpoint is missing but not critical - frontend has fallback. All 4 subscription plans (Explorer, Startup, Growth, Elite) are correctly configured with proper multipliers, tap limits, and pricing.

GET /api/subscription/plans.details: Returns 4 plans with correct pricing (Explorer=FREE, Startup=₹299, Growth=₹549, Elite=₹799)

GET /api/subscription/user/{uid}.details: Returns correct subscription status with plan, multiplier, tap_limit, can_redeem

POST /api/subscription/payment/{uid}.details: Accepts payment submission with plan, duration, amount, utr_number, screenshot

POST /api/admin/subscription/pricing.details: Admin can update subscription pricing for all plans

Tap game limits.details: Tap limits enforced based on subscription (100/200/300/400)

Subscription page at /subscription.details: Page loads and displays all 4 plans with features

Plan comparison table.details: Table shows Mining Rate, Daily Taps, Referral Weight, Can Redeem, PRC Expires
